entries.final_answer: The Standards & Security report's PWA checks (manifest, service worker) are presence-only booleans with no evidence, mixed into a flat check list. Issue #145 asks for a dedicated Progressive Web Resilience section reporting manifest characteristics, service-worker state, offline/network resilience, and installability as Pass/Fail/N/A with evidence — not another aggregate score.
entries.question: What problem does this feature solve?
entries.rationale: Derived from spec.md Problem/Goal sections, authored from issue #145 and a read of src/engines/standards.js.
